zh.lifeSummary: 當Béatrice de Vienne於大約1160年出生在法國o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾維安時，她的父親Géraud Ier de Mâcon37歲，母親Maurette de Salins30歲。她於1175年與Humbert III de Savoie結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1230年4月8日在法國薩伏伊享年71歲，埋葬在法國o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊沙吉皮-德-爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Béatrice de Vienne于大约1160年出生在法国o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾維安时，她的父亲Géraud Ier de Mâcon37岁，母亲Maurette de Salins30岁。她于1175年与Humbert III de Savoie结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1230年4月8日在法国薩伏伊享年71岁，埋葬在法国o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊沙吉皮-德-爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vienne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Celina, Luc, Philippe, Sylvie.
Dutch: topographic name from Middle Dutch venne ‘water meadow’. In North America, this surname may also be a shortened form of the more common Dutch variants Van der Venne and Van de Venne.

variants.name: Venn
meanings: English: variant of Fenn in southwestern England, where standard English f is often pronounced as v.
German: topographic name from Middle High German, Middle Low German venne ‘pit, moor’, or ‘water meadow’.

nameMeanings.name: Béatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Béatrice de Vienne was born about 1160, in Vienne, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, France, her father, Géraud Ier de Mâcon, was 37 and her mother, Maurette de Salins, was 30. She married Humbert III de Savoie in 1175. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 8 April 1230, in Savoie, France, at the age of 71, and was buried in Saint-Pierre-de-Curtille, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Béatrice de Vienne est née environ 1160, à Vienne, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Géraud Ier de Mâcon, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Maurette de Salins, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Humbert III de Savoie en 1175. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 8 avril 1230, à Savoie, France, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint-Pierre-de-Curtille, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Béatrice de Vienne um 1160 in Vienne, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Géraud Ier de Mâcon 37 und ihre Mutter Maurette de Salins 30. Sie hat 1175 Humbert III de Savoie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 8. April 1230 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Savoyen, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Pierre-de-Curtille, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrice de Vienne è nata il circa 1160 nel Vienne, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, sua padre, Géraud Ier de Mâcon, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Maurette de Salins, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Humbert III de Savoie nel 1175. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 8 aprile 1230, nel Savoia, Francia, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolta a Saint-Pierre-de-Curtille, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Béatrice de Vienneが約1160年にフランスルhoネ-アルペスイスeアヴィエンで生まれた時，父Géraud Ier de Mâconは37歳，母Maurette de Salinsは30歳であった。1175年にHumbert III de Savoieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1230年4月8日にフランスサボイで71歳で死去し，フランスルhoネ-アルペスサボイサイント-パエレ-デ-クウルティルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Béatrice de Vienne(이)가 대략 1160년 프랑스 ho니-알프스 이스e르 비니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Géraud Ier de Mâcon(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maurette de Salins(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1175년 Humbert III de Savoie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1230년 4월 8일 프랑스 서아보이에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 ho니-알프스 서아보이 세인트-피레-데-커틸에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrice de Vienne nasceu aproximadamente 1160, em Vienne, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Géraud Ier de Mâcon, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Maurette de Salins, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Humbert III de Savoie em 1175. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 8 de abril de 1230, em Savoie, França, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint-Pierre-de-Curtille, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Béatrice de Vienne родилась около 1160 г. в местности виенн, исeр, рoне-алпесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Géraud Ier de Mâcon было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Maurette de Salins, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Humbert III de Savoie в 1175 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 8 апреля 1230 г. в местности савои, Франция в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности сеинт-пьирре-де-куртилл, савои, рoне-алпесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Béatrice de Vienne nació aproximadamente 1160, en Vienne, Isère, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Géraud Ier de Mâcon, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Maurette de Salins, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Humbert III de Savoie en 1175. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 8 de abril de 1230, en Savoie, Francia, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultada en Saint-Pierre-de-Curtille, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
